consistency.class_restriction: Paladin only, appropriate for a Smite spell variant.

quality.description_clarity: Clear. Describes the effect on a single weapon attack, granting extra damage and utility (revealing invisibility, imposing dim light, preventing invisibility).
quality.mechanics_review: Mechanically sound. Bonus action casting time allows for casting before an attack. Concentration limits duration. Scaling with higher slots is standard for 2nd-level offensive buffs.
quality.synergy: Excellent synergy with Paladin's focus on weapon attacks and radiant damage themes.

damage_scaling.scaling_formula: +1d6 per slot level above 2nd (e.g., 3rd level = 3d6, 4th level = 4d6, etc.)

utility_effects: Target cannot become invisible while the spell lasts.
mechanics.trigger: Next successful weapon attack before the spell ends.

analysis.overall_assessment: High quality, mechanically consistent spell. Fits well within the Paladin spell list by offering a focused damage boost with useful anti-invisibility utility.
